name: pi-pp-platform
description: Web control plane for the pair-programmer AI coding harness on the pi runtime — multi-provider generation, cross-vendor judging, best-of-N, budgets, and a full run-lifecycle UI

scripts.demo: pnpm -F @pp/ui build && pnpm -F @pp/server build && node scripts/demo.mjs
scripts.start: pnpm -F @pp/ui build && pnpm -F @pp/server build && node scripts/start.mjs
scripts.serve: pnpm -F @pp/ui build && pnpm -F @pp/server build && node scripts/serve.mjs
